text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Apr 16 13:33:45 2014
New Revision: 351382
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351382
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351382/

Log:
  - Update to 7.0.2
  
  PR:		ports/188669
  Submitted by:	Renaud Chaput <renchap@cocoa-x.com> (maintainer)

Deleted:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/files/
Modified:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile	Wed Apr 16 13:31:01 2014	(r351381)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile	Wed Apr 16 13:33:45 2014	(r351382)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ohai
-PORTVERSION=	6.20.0
+PORTVERSION=	7.0.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
@@ -12,9 +12,10 @@ COMMENT=	Ohai profiles your system and e
 LICENSE=	APACHE20
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-ipaddress>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-ipaddress \
-		rubygem-mixlib-log>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-log \
-		rubygem-mixlib-config>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-config \
+		rubygem-mime-types>=1.16:${PORTSDIR}/misc/rubygem-mime-types \
 		rubygem-mixlib-cli>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-cli \
+		rubygem-mixlib-config>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-config \
+		rubygem-mixlib-log>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-log \
 		rubygem-mixlib-shellout>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-shellout \
 		rubygem-systemu>=2.5.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-systemu \
 		rubygem-yajl-ruby>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-yajl-ruby
